# Browser tab icon (favicon)

Put browser tab icon here:

- File name: `favicon.ico`
- Path used by frontend: `App/frontend/public/favicon.ico`
- Recommended size for source: **512x512 px** (square)
- Include at least `16x16`, `32x32`, and `48x48` sizes inside `.ico`.

`index.html` already references `/favicon.ico`.
